queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Evernote' AND publisher = 'Evernote Corporation';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Evernote' AND publisher = 'Evernote Corporation' AND version_compare(version, '11.19.4') < 0);

refs.618c6751:
# Learn more about .exe install scripts:
# http://fleetdm.com/learn-more-about/exe-install-scripts

$exeFilePath = "${env:INSTALLER_PATH}"

try {

# Evernote is an electron-builder NSIS installer.
# /S = silent. /allusers installs machine-wide (required for Fleet's SYSTEM context).
$processOptions = @{
  FilePath = "$exeFilePath"
  ArgumentList = "/S /allusers"
  PassThru = $true
  Wait = $true
}

# Start process and track exit code
$process = Start-Process @processOptions
$exitCode = $process.ExitCode

# Prints the exit code
Write-Host "Install exit code: $exitCode"
Exit $exitCode

} catch {
  Write-Host "Error: $_"
  Exit 1
}
